Plaintiffs Mai Tai Investors, Lp And Trader Vic'S Management Corporation'S Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Plaintiffs Mai Tai Investors, LP, and Trader Vic's Management Corporation's Order to Show Cause re: preliminary injunction (transferred from Department 301, per recusal of Judge Busch). Appearances: Gerald M. Murphy, of Luce Forward, (415) 356-4689, appearing for Plaintiffs and moving party; David W. Ammons, Esq., and Don Margolis, Esq., Deputy City Attorneys, CCSF,(415) 554-3954, appearing for Defendant, The CCSF, and opposing party. Argued and the Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: Application for preliminary injunction is denied. Plaintiffs unlikely to prevail on merits. Order Denying Plaintiffs' Motion for Preliminary Injunction, signed in open Court.(302/CWW)Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5759

Order To Show Cause Re Preliminary Injunction
Off Calendar Mar-26-2009 Text Ruling
